title: Rolling stability: 3-year rolling Spearman
method: 3-year rolling Spearman correlation between cascade slope and forward 5-day realized vol, computed for each calendar year 2002-2024 (24 windows)
headline: 24/24 windows negative on SPY and XLF. 20-24 of 24 windows negative on other assets. 18-23 of 24 windows |ρ|>0.05. The cascade slope is robustly negative across the ENTIRE 2002-2024 sample. The effect is not driven by a single crisis or regime.
